name: 007n7 and Noli
description:
another request.. giggles. (sorry i took my time w this im not used to writing fluff so i procrastinated for a while.)

its honestly both baffling and endearing to me, but i cant say no💔💔

to sum it up both Noli and 007n7 are both head over heels for you, the unaware reader. still part of the collage au, all details remain the same - yall all share the same dorm and you're on pretty 'friendly' terms with the both of them.

i still tried to make their personalities vary.. noli gets drunk on praise easily and is VERY needy, whereas 007n7's love language is insulting you and pwning you on video games. (he purposefully slips up to let you win, and thats the best you're gonna get from this virgin loser) u could prolly romance both of them if u tried hard enough but i gotta warn u noli WILL leave u with a bruised cervix if u two get freaky.

ok im running out of things to yap about... PLS IF UR GONNA REQUEST NO MORE 007N7😭😭😭 i love him too but theres other characters too.. cough cough telamon/shedletsky

i think paddleleaf on youtube is the artist of the pfp but im not 100% sure.
creator: Obsessssed
